description:
A Fresh Way to Do Statistics

JASP is a cross-platform software that allows you to conduct statistical analyses in seconds, and without having to learn programming or risking a programming mistake. It aims to be a complete statistical package for both Bayesian and Frequentist statistical methods, that is easy to use and familiar to users of SPSS.
New Features
- JASP Encryption files: it's now possible to encrypt your JASP file with a password. Also possibility to encrypt the JASP file so that it can be read only by the JASP team (for issue reproduction)
- CSV Preview: when loading a CSV (or TSV) file, a preview is first displayed, so that the user can check whether the right column separator is used, and that the numbers are read with the right format.
- Save event (also autosave) is now unobtrusive: the necessary files needed for the JASP files, are first copied, and the making of the JASP files is done afterwards in an apart thread, so that the user is not hindered by this process.
- Add MSIX standalone installer: MSIX installer is what is used by Windows Store, and is much quicker than MSI installer on Windows. This installer is now available standalone and will replace the MSI installer in the future releases.
Fixes
- On Window, JASP can become really slow due to Power Automate Desktop (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6173)
- Massive speedup when reading big datafile (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6172)
- Remove boost system dependency (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4183)
- "Set current workspace with these values" does not set workspace values (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4229, https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6199)
- Improve Pop-up menus, make them scalable (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-desktop/pull/6197)
Descriptives
- QQ-Plots does not work properly with missing / empty values (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspDescriptives/pull/477), issues: https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4123, https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4162, https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/4185.
- Range, Median, IQR, and boxplot are not displayed for ordinal variables (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspDescriptives/pull/471). Issue https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/3738
- Raincloud plot not showing all data points (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspDescriptives/pull/464). Issue https://github.com/jasp-stats/jasp-issues/issues/3971
BFPack
- Name changes, fix log bug, improve help, fix parameters not showing up for mancova (https://github.com/jasp-stats/jaspBfpack/pull/16)
Other analyses
- Fixes and features are available in their beta version in the Module library.
